title: Payment Receipt
description: Receipt that supplies information about the final state of a payment.

iat.description: The creation timestamp as a Unix epoch.

reference.description: The hash of the closed Mandate that this receipt is binding to.

error.description: A unique error code. Present if and only if status is Error.

error_description.description: A human-readable error description. Present if and only if status is Error.

payment_id.description: A unique identifier for the payment.

psp_confirmation_id.description: A unique identifier for the transaction confirmation at the PSP. Present only if status is Success.

network_confirmation_id.description: A unique identifier for the transaction confirmation at the network. Present only if status is Success.
